title: UserTaskListCompact
description: A user task list represents the tasks assigned to a particular user. It provides API access to a user’s [My Tasks](https://asana.com/guide/help/fundamentals/my-tasks) view in Asana.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

name.description: The name of the user task list.

owner.description: The owner of the user task list, i.e. the person whose My Tasks is represented by this resource.

workspace.description: The workspace in which the user task list is located.
